displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Pan Muffin Mini 26X20X2.5cm
• Honesty and reliability - these two traits have been the cornerstone of PhoonHuat's success since its fledgling years as a small shop along Middle Road . Steeped in history and tradition, the company was established in 1947 by Wong Tai Fuang when he moved to Singapore from Hainan Island, China.
• An entrepreneurial spirit enabled him to conceive of this business but it was sheer hard work and shrewd commercial sense that transformed his meagre 35 sq metre shop into a profitable business supplying baking ingredients.

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Store at room temperature. As a precaution, however, it is recommended to keep certain products away from heat and humidity (see recommendations on the package).

product.description:
Traditional oven cooking (max. 220°C). Not suitable for the microwave oven. Do not use metal objects in the moulds.

-Not dishwasher-safe !.

metaData.Key Information:
-Thick-steel heavy tray with 12 moulds for baking 12 individual muffins ((Diameter bottom: 5.3cm; Diameter top: 7.8cm).
-Moulds arranged in a manner to optimise the circulation of hot air. Excellent cooking results thanks to iron: the tray reaches high temperatures, enabling the juices to caramelise.
-Grease the tray before use, even diffusion of heat and uniform cooking.
-Functional and practical non-stick tray: PFOA-free PTFE guaranteed coating for easier mould release, steel protection against oxidation and easy cleaning.
metaData.Preparation: Care: wash by hand (non-abrasive sponge). Not dishwasher-safe.
